description_long: This object is a slender potted plant featuring a single, upright green stem with several elongated, oval leaves spaced along its length. The plant is rooted in a round, deep blue pot filled with dark soil, and the pot has a smooth, unadorned surface. The leaves are a healthy green, with some showing a slight curve or tilt, and are distributed asymmetrically along the stem. The pot appears to be made of ceramic or plastic, with a matte finish and no visible decorative patterns. The overall appearance is minimalist and modern, making it suitable for contemporary urban environments. There are no visible plant labels, tags, or additional accessories attached to the pot or plant.
description: A minimalist potted plant with a single upright stem and sparse green leaves, set in a plain deep blue round pot filled with soil. The design is simple and modern, with no visible decorations or labels.
description_view_0: Front view shows the plant's upright stem with several leaves facing forward, and the deep blue pot is fully visible.
description_view_1: This angle reveals more of the right side of the plant, with some leaves angled outward and the pot's round shape clearly defined.
description_view_2: The back view displays the stem with fewer visible leaves, emphasizing the plain surface of the blue pot.
description_view_3: Left side view highlights the plant's asymmetrical leaf arrangement and the smooth, undecorated pot.
